subject: [SM] Kcadm job implementation
commit_message:
[SM] Kcadm job implementation

This patch provides basic kcadm job to configure Keycloak.
For more information about kcadm check:
https://www.keycloak.org/docs/latest/server_admin/#using-the-admin-cli

Issue-ID: OOM-2486
Signed-off-by: Dominik Mizyn <d.mizyn@partner.samsung.com>
Change-Id: I9cb76cb821a5241644ac021c07d8ad3934eb92ec
